posts.text:
Iran’s attempt to close the Strait of Hormuz is done at its own peril. 

President Trump’s decision to take the war to Kharg Island - the crown jewel of Iran’s oil and gas economy - was necessary, bold and in my view, highly effective. This will help shorten the war. Seldom in warfare does an enemy provide you a single target like Kharg Island that could dramatically alter the outcome of the conflict. If Iran loses control or the ability to operate its oil infrastructure from Kharg Island, its e

Mr. President, I could not agree more. Most importantly, you acted in the nick of time to prevent the religious Nazi regime in Iran from having at least 10 nuclear weapons. When the Iranians boasted to your negotiating team - Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner - that they had enough 60% enriched uranium to make 10 bombs, you acted. 

The Iranian regime thought they were dealing with Biden or Obama, believing we’d beg them not to go forward and give them a bunch of money. They made a fatal miscalcul

Yet another example of the Biden administration’s failure to enforce existing laws leading to tragedy.


Bill Melugin (@BillMelugin_)

The man charged by DOJ for selling the gun used by the ODU terrorist was caught straw purchasing three guns in 2021 (all of which were later recovered at crime scenes, including a homicide) but the Biden DOJ declined to prosecute. He got a warning & signed an apology letter.





— https://nitter.net/BillMelugin_/status/2032551745411305783#m

To the adversaries of America: if Donald Trump offers you a good deal, take it. 

Mr. President, your observations about the capabilities of the men and women in the U.S. military are spot on. However, it becomes truly magic when the commander in chief is at their level and is as capable as they are. 

President @realDonaldTrump is in a league of his own when it comes to smartly defending America and standing up to evil. 

Reagan on steroids.


Rapid Response 47 (@RapidResponse47)







— https

The millions of illegal immigrants that the Biden Administration let into our country included thousands of known or suspected terrorists. These dangerous people are very hard to identify, leaving you and your family at risk. 
 
Leaving @DHSgov unfunded is gambling with our national security. To my Democrat colleagues – end this shutdown NOW.

Video

For four years, millions of illegal immigrants poured across the border from all over the world with little to no vetting from the Biden Administration. 
 
Illegal immigrants who commit crimes against the American people must be deported immediately. Failure to do so will only result in more deaths and tragedies that could have been avoided.

Video

Not only is this an ignorant observation, it’s offensive. ISIS and all those inspired by ISIS appreciate the political cover from Norfolk, VA Commonwealth’s Attorney Fatehi.

His kind of thinking – where it’s not really about radical Islam, it’s always something else – is dominating the Democrat Party.

Thank God that way of thinking has been totally rejected by President Trump.

If these attacks do not create a sense of urgency for Democrats to fund @DHSgov, what would? I can’t believe that def

Tragic and heartbreaking loss of six great Americans serving our nation. One of the most dangerous jobs in the entire military is mid-air refueling, and it is vital to sustain the war effort. 

To the families of the fallen: may God grant you peace and comfort. Know that your loved ones made the ultimate sacrifice to protect our nation. 

God bless all those participating in Operation Epic Fury. You are making our country and the world safer.


U.S. Central Command (@CENTCOM)

All Crew Members o

Yet another reminder of the evil of radical Islam abroad and at home. The shooting at Old Dominion University that resulted in the killing of an ROTC instructor was perpetrated by a convicted ISIS supporter who would destroy our way of life if he could. 
 
So grateful to those who heroically fought back to stop this mad man and heartbroken at the loss of a great man involved in the ROTC program.
 
To the American people, this is a time of testing. Keep your eyes open and stay strong.


FBI Direc

I am pleased that the Senate has passed this landmark housing legislation. By removing burdensome regulations and cutting red tape, American families can look forward to lower housing costs on the horizon.

I appreciate @SenatorTimScott  and @POTUS’ leadership on this legislation and am proud to stand with them in addressing one of the most important economic issues of our time.

When people think about the concept of the American Dream, one of the key components of that idea is home ownership.

Yet another reminder of how cruel hate-filled antisemitism can be. To those involved in protecting the synagogue, God bless you. To my Jewish brothers and sisters: keep the faith, America is with you. 
 
If history has taught us anything, confronting evil comes at a price, but the biggest price to be paid is to appease evil.
 
God bless America.


The Washington Times (@WashTimes)

Michigan authorities raced to a synagogue Thursday in West Bloomfield after police said a driver crashed into the b

Great visit today with Charleston Mayor William Cogswell. As a city prone to flooding and other natural disasters, it’s vital for Charleston to have the necessary infrastructure that can withstand extreme weather. I’ll gladly keep working with state and local officials in order to secure funding for these projects at the federal level. 
 
Mayor Cogswell – thank you for all of your work to make Charleston a safer place to live and a premier destination for visitors.

I was just informed that the Spanish government has permanently recalled their ambassador to Israel. This is hard for me to absorb. Spain is a member of NATO, and the United States and Israel are in joint operations against the Iranian regime who openly calls for the destruction of the Jewish State, attacks against the West, and seeks to purify Islam in its own image.

The religious Nazi regime in Iran is the problem, not the Jewish State. I hope Spain’s actions will not encourage the tyrannical

Through Operation Epic Fury, we are destroying Iran’s nuclear and ballistic missile capabilities and weakening the regime’s ability to threaten the world with terror.

None of this would be possible without our Commander in Chief, his cabinet, and our brave men and women in uniform.

Video

The days of Obama and Biden’s weak leadership are over.

Iran miscalculated President @realDonaldTrump’s resolve and Operation Epic Fury is the consequence.

Video
Great meeting with @CofC  President Hsu. Under his leadership, College of Charleston has maintained a strong academic standing and provided world-class career preparation to its students.
